body:
Hi Amara,

Following up on our conversation last week about the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) portfolio review — I've had a chance to dig into the climate infrastructure space a bit more deeply, and I think there are a few emerging dynamics worth flagging before your Q4 LP update. Specifically, the grid-edge computing angle that [Verdant Systems](verdant-systems) is pursuing seems to be gaining real traction with utility procurement teams in ERCOT, which could meaningfully de-risk their go-to-market thesis. I'd love to carve out 30 minutes this week or next to walk through what I'm seeing and get your read on whether it shifts how you're thinking about the sector at the seed stage. Let me know what works on your end.

Best,
Omar
